_comment: Copy this file to jarvis.config.json and fill in your values. The onboarding flow (BOOTSTRAP.md) fills most of this for you. Secrets do NOT go here — they go in .env (see .env.example).

update._comment: 'Update JARVIS' git-fetches this remote/branch and refreshes only core_manifest.txt files. Defaults are fine for a normal clone; override only if your remote/branch differ.

paths._comment: Absolute path to this installed kit folder, and your Claude Code executable.

modules._comment: Toggle optional modules. Core (planning/memory/tasks/reviews) is always on.

dashboard._comment: Set after you deploy your own Apps Script (see setup_dashboard.md). URL only; the token lives in .env as DASHBOARD_TOKEN.

calendar._comment: Set apps_script_url after you deploy your own Calendar Bridge Apps Script (see setup_calendar.md). Token lives in .env as CALENDAR_TOKEN.

voice._comment: v1.1 advanced module. Public hostname for your tunnel and local ports.
